description: A ground-level photograph from the EU-27 photo survey in 2012, showing a herd of light brown cattle grazing on a semi-natural dry grassland under a partly cloudy sky. The landscape is characterised by extensive grassland with scattered low shrubs and dry herbaceous plants. A low, weathered stone wall serves as a boundary running from the foreground towards the background on the right side of the image. The foreground also shows a dirt path or area. The scene depicts a typical semi-natural grassland maintained by less intensive agricultural activities like livestock grazing, as described in definitions related to EUNIS and the Habitats Directive. The photo is labelled "LUCAS".
